text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 25. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
